description_long: This is a rectangular billiard table with a deep red felt playing surface bordered by a dark, likely wooden or composite frame. The table features metallic or chrome-finished pocket openings at each corner and along the sides, with visible fasteners or rivets evenly spaced around the rail. A single billiard cue is positioned resting against the table in some views, suggesting readiness for play. The legs are thick, blocky, and finished in a matching dark color, providing a sturdy and stable base. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible branding or ornate details, making it suitable for both recreational and upscale urban environments.
description: A modern billiard table with a deep red felt surface, dark sturdy frame, and metallic pocket openings. Includes a single billiard cue and blocky legs for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the table, red felt surface, and a billiard cue leaning against the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the table's length, the red felt, and the cue placed along the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cue now on the left, showing the opposite side of the table and the uniformity of the frame and pockets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cue on the right, emphasizing the table's length and the symmetry of the legs and pockets.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six round pocket openings are visible: one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side. The pockets are open, metallic-rimmed, and appear uniform in size, with no significant difference between corner and side pockets.
attribute_rail_cushions: The rail cushions are covered in the same dark material as the frame, with a flat, wide profile and metallic fasteners or rivets spaced evenly along the perimeter. No branding or markings are visible, and the cushions appear to be in good condition with a modern, minimalistic style.
attribute_leg_design: The table has four thick, rectangular block-style legs, finished in a dark color matching the frame. The legs are positioned at the corners and provide a solid, stable base with no decorative elements or visible supports.
attribute_felt_covering: The felt covering is a deep red color, appears smooth and well-maintained, with no visible seams, wear, or branding. The texture looks standard for billiard tables, and the condition suggests it is either new or well-cared for.
